title: Methods should not return values that are never used
description: Methods should not return values that are never usedAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmelldesignunusedWhy is this an issue?Private methods are intended for use only within their scope. If these methods return values that are not utilized by any calling functions, it indicates that the return operation is unnecessary. Removing such returns can enhance both efficiency and code clarity.Noncompliant code exampleclass SomeClass { private int PrivateMethod() => 42; public void PublicMethod() { PrivateMethod(); // Noncompliant: the result of PrivateMethod is not used } }Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CI©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.description: Check for private methods that return values which are never used
